sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26767" key="dih/qhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διήθ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n26767.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">product of sifting:</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δ. γῆς</foreign> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">riddled</tr_> earth, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.88</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δ. αἵματος,</foreign> of urine, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Steph.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Urin.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
